item.title: Circle launches cirBTC on Ethereum, entering the wrapped bitcoin market in direct competition with Coinbase
Coinbase and Cardless launch credit card with stablecoin-backed rewards program
OKX expands X-Perps in Europe to include Magnificent 7 tech stocks, gold, and oil futures
Humanity Protocol loses $36M after multisig wallet private keys compromised via laptop breach; token down 73%
Over 200 crypto firms petition US Senate to advance CLARITY Act on digital asset regulation
Japan's SBI Shinsei Bank links retail deposits to crypto rewards program
MicroStrategy resumes Bitcoin accumulation, adding to corporate treasury amid selloff
